title: Agent introspection + dispatch-history surface
description: Pi tools agent-trace + inspect-agent + query-agent-dispatch — orchestrator can query dispatch history (per-agent or session-wide) with input / output / usage / model / stopReason / duration, plus inspect any single agent's full spec + last-dispatch state + cumulative usage. Closes FB-016 (FGAP-166).
acceptance_criteria: agent-trace Pi tool returns last N dispatches for an agent
inspect-agent Pi tool returns full spec + health snapshot
query-agent-dispatch Pi tool scans .pi/agent/sessions/ JSONL filtered + paginated
All three surface in pi-agent-dispatch with companion scripts/orchestrator/ CLI dual-surfaces
